purpose: Validate the first MORI native compact weighted-combine ABI without launching the full sparse-attention model surface.

decision_context.hot_helper_ladder: MBS1/MBS2/MBS4/MBS8 ladder establishes MindSpeed-style hot-helper as a real feature: it improves late tok/GPU/s and lowers memory from MBS1 upward, and changes the fit boundary at MBS8.
decision_context.path_decision: Continue native MORI balanced-MoE as the mainline around the proven hot/cold/helper owner-compact layout. Treat Primus-Turbo TurboEPBackend as a raw-top-k/no-helper side branch.

changed_contract.mori_api: combine_standard_ep_compact_native(..., top_scores_flat, top_k, flat_position_offset, token_output_rows, return_token_output=True)
changed_contract.output: Returns source-rank rows, source-rank flat positions, and a MORI-owned score-weighted token-major output.
changed_contract.torchitan_use: The opt-in TorchTitan path can remove the separate weighted_scatter_add_from_flat_positions launch in forward while keeping source-rank rows/positions for the existing autograd-correct backward.

build_validation.command: cmake --build build --clean-first -j$(nproc), then copy libmori_*.so into python/mori/
cmake --build build --clean-first -j$(nproc), then copy libmori_*.so into python/mori/

invalid_full_model_smoke.reason: The node had active unrelated jobs and high VRAM residency. The smoke reached MORI JIT compilation, then OOMed in sparse MLA forward before MoE combine.

synthetic_remote_compact_combine_smoke.read: Covers remote receive and destination-local top-score weighting. The test oracle models the current BF16 atomic accumulation contract.

next_gates: Run the MBS8 hot-helper current-best surface with CANARY_STANDARD_EP_MORI_NATIVE_COMPACT_WEIGHTED_OUTPUT=1 on a clean 8x node.
Profile whether standard_ep.combine.weighted_scatter_add/token-return disappears and what native compact combine adds.
